underlying_goal: Run a Gas Town deacon patrol: execute heartbeat, check hook, and if no hook exists, create and execute a mol-deacon-patrol wisp
friction_detail: Claude spent most of the session struggling with beads database initialization issues, repeatedly trying different fixes (bd init --force, config changes) that broke or conflicted with each other, never fully stabilizing the environment.
brief_summary: User wanted deacon to run patrol (heartbeat, hook check, wisp creation/execution), but Claude got stuck in a prolonged debugging loop around beads database initialization and directory context issues, only partially completing the patrol before being interrupted.
